message:
fix: Snappy literal length off-by-one, stack overflow on large arrays

- Fix Snappy decompressor: literal length for extraBytes was off by +1
  (started at 1 instead of 0, then added 1 again)
- Fix unsigned 4-byte offset in Snappy copy-4 (>>> 0)
- Replace spread operator push(...arr) with loop to avoid stack overflow
  on 1M+ element arrays (query-do.ts, fragment-do.ts, index.ts)
- Remove incorrect definition level parsing for flat Parquet schemas
  (non-nullable columns have no def levels)
- Add try/catch error handling to query-do handleQuery for better errors
- Make seed-local-r2.ts resilient to individual table failures

Results: 100K Parquet in 41ms, 1M in 554ms, Iceberg 100K in 43ms
